creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
- Update security/gpgme to 1.3.1

How-To-Repeat: Use attached diff

There is a shared library bump in this version 18->19, so dependent ports will
need PORTREVISION bumps.

The following ports depend on security/gpgme and need a PORTREVISON bump:
deskutils/basket
deskutils/kdepim3
deskutils/kdepim4
deskutils/kdepimlibs4
devel/bazaar
finance/qhacc
mail/anubis
mail/balsa
mail/claws-mail
mail/elmo
mail/elmo-devel
mail/mutt-devel
mail/sylpheed
mail/sylpheed3
net-im/ayttm
net-im/centericq
net-im/centerim
net-im/centerim-devel
net-im/mcabber
polish/ekg2
security/gpa
security/openvas-libnasl
security/pecl-gnupg
security/py-pyme
security/ruby-gpgme
security/seahorse

The following ports reference the shared library number and that needs
increased as well:
deskutils/basket
devel/bazaar
finance/qhacc
mail/anubis
mail/balsa
mail/elmo
mail/elmo-devel
mail/sylpheed
mail/sylpheed3
net-im/ayttm
net-im/centericq
net-im/centerim
net-im/centerim-devel
net-im/mcabber
security/gpa
security/openvas-libnasl
security/pecl-gnupg
security/ruby-gpgme
security/seahorse
